comments.workspaces: client/ is intentionally NOT a workspace: it's the live Vercel deploy (Root Directory = client, own vercel.json) and builds standalone. Only shared/ and mobile/ are linked here.
comments.overrides: @expo/vector-icons pulls its own expo-font (57.x, built for SDK 54+) alongside the 12.0.10 that expo@51 ships. Loading the newer JS against Expo Go's SDK 51 native module throws 'ExpoFontLoader.getLoadedFonts is not a function'. Pin the whole tree to the SDK 51 version.
